search_description: Type at least 2 characters to search specs, changes, and project docs.
search_start_typing: Start typing to search the workspace.
project_selector_description: Switch to a different project or add a new one.
add_project_description: Browse for a directory containing an openspec/ folder.
empty_project_description: OpenSpec requires a project to store specifications and changes. Browse for a directory containing an openspec/ folder.
settings_description: Theme, language, command, and version settings
settings_language_description: Choose the interface language for application UI.
settings_theme_description: Choose the color theme for the interface.
settings_explorer_description: Control whether single-click in the Explorer opens a reusable preview tab or a normal confirmed tab.
settings_enable_preview_tabs_description: On by default. When enabled, single-click reuses one preview tab. Use Ctrl+Click or the item context menu to open a regular tab.
settings_workflow_description: Choose how copied OpenSpec workflow text should be formatted for your coding tool.
settings_commands_description: Toggle which workflow shortcuts should appear in workspace and change command rows.
settings_versions_description: Check installed and latest versions for OpenSpec WebUI and the OpenSpec CLI.
settings_versions_webui_description: Representative npm global-install update path for the WebUI package.
settings_versions_openspec_description: Representative npm global-install update path for the OpenSpec CLI package.
settings_versions_post_update_descriptio: After upgrading the OpenSpec CLI, run this command in each registered project to refresh generated instructions, skills, and commands.
settings_core_commands_description: Always available. Visibility only affects contexts where each command normally appears.
settings_expanded_commands_description: These commands depend on local OpenSpec workflow availability.
settings_expanded_commands_disabled: Expanded command availability could not be loaded from the local OpenSpec CLI, so these controls are disabled.
settings_expanded_available: Available from the local OpenSpec workflows.
settings_expanded_unavailable: Not available from the local OpenSpec workflows.
dashboard_active_changes_description: Ask your AI to propose a change. Use Next Step commands to continue ongoing work.
dashboard_recent_activity_description: Newest change and spec updates across the workspace.
dashboard_invalid_config_description: config.yaml could not be parsed, so structured planning data is unavailable. Review the errors and raw file content below.
dashboard_migration_needed_description: OpenSpec planning uses config.yaml, but valuable context may still exist only in legacy project.md.
dashboard_legacy_present_description: project.md is legacy. OpenSpec planning uses config.yaml.
dashboard_ai_context_description: Included in every OpenSpec planning request.
dashboard_workflow_schema_description: Default workflow schema declared in config.yaml.
dashboard_legacy_doc_description: AI planning does not rely on this file. Review it only for unmigrated legacy context.
error_project_binding_timed_out: Timed out waiting for project binding
error_failed_to_send_project_bind_messag: Failed to send project bind message
